# SMBCyberHub — Complete Product & Company Information

> Privacy-first, downloadable cybersecurity compliance kits for small businesses. One-time purchase. No subscriptions, no logins, no SaaS.

Website: https://smbcyberhub.com
Contact: info@smbcyberhub.com
Founded by: Jim SMBCyberHub, Cybersecurity Compliance Specialist (20+ years enterprise experience)

---

## Products & Pricing

### Free Sample Kit — €0 (Free)
- Purchase: https://smbcyberhub.gumroad.com/l/samplekit
- Product page: https://smbcyberhub.com/free-cyber-security-training/
- Includes: 1 phishing awareness training slide, 1 staff quiz with answer key, sample compliance checklist, policy template preview, training log template
- No registration, no email required. Instant PDF download.

### Basic Cybersecurity Kit — €49 (One-Time)
- Purchase: https://smbcyberhub.gumroad.com/l/basickit
- Product page: https://smbcyberhub.com/basic-cybersecurity-kit/
- Includes: 3 core training modules (phishing, passwords, device security), 3 staff quizzes, essential policy templates, compliance checklists
- 1-team license

### Pro Cybersecurity Kit — €99 (One-Time)
- Purchase: https://smbcyberhub.gumroad.com/l/prokit
- Product page: https://smbcyberhub.com/pro-cybersecurity-kit/
- Includes: All 6 training modules (phishing, passwords, device security, MFA, social engineering, ransomware), 6 staff quizzes, complete policy templates, all compliance checklists, audit documentation, onboarding guides
- Unlimited internal use license (multiple offices, growing teams)
- Best value for full compliance

All kits are delivered as downloadable ZIP files containing printable PDFs. No software installation required.

---

## Who Is SMBCyberHub For?

- Small businesses with 1–20 employees
- Office managers and business owners with no IT background
- Companies preparing for cyber insurance renewal
- Businesses needing GDPR compliance documentation
- Teams that want audit-ready compliance without monthly subscriptions
- Accountants, law firms, healthcare practices, and other professional services

## Who Is SMBCyberHub NOT For?

- Large enterprises needing active phishing simulation
- Organizations requiring real-time threat monitoring
- Companies with dedicated IT/security teams that need advanced tools

---

## Compliance Framework Alignment

- GDPR Article 39.1(b) — Staff security awareness training
- NIST Cybersecurity Framework (CSF) 2.0
- ISO/IEC 27001 Clause 7.2.2
- FTC Safeguards Rule (US — covers accountants, tax preparers, financial services)
- Cyber insurance documentation requirements

---

## How It Compares to Alternatives

### SMBCyberHub vs KnowBe4
- KnowBe4: ~$18/user/month, SaaS platform, active phishing simulation, designed for enterprises
- SMBCyberHub: €99 one-time, downloadable, offline-ready, designed for small teams without IT staff
- 3-year cost for 10 users: KnowBe4 ~$6,480 vs SMBCyberHub €99

### SMBCyberHub vs Wizer
- Wizer: $3/user/month, freemium SaaS, video-based training, requires signup
- SMBCyberHub: €99 one-time, no signup, printable PDFs, offline-ready
- 3-year cost for 10 users: Wizer ~$1,080 vs SMBCyberHub €99

### Key Differentiators
- No per-user fees. No recurring costs. No vendor lock-in.
- No logins, no accounts, no data uploaded to any cloud service.
- All materials work offline — print and deploy.
- 60-minute implementation — no IT expertise required.

---

"I printed the kit, ran the training at lunch, and had our whole team documented in under an hour. Zero hassle." — Niall C, Small Business Owner, Dublin

"All done in one afternoon. No logins, no subscriptions, just what we needed for our cyber insurance." — Anna F, Café Owner, Boston

"Passed our GDPR audit on the first attempt! The auditor was impressed with our documentation." — Michael R, Managing Director, Sydney

"Saved us 20+ hours of compliance work. Best investment we made this year." — Sarah L, Operations Manager, Toronto

"Cyber insurance premiums went down after implementing the training. ROI was immediate." — David K, Finance Director

"Our FTC compliance was overdue and I had no idea where to start. The kit gave us policies, training records, and checklists that our compliance reviewer accepted immediately." — Rachel M, CPA Practice Owner, Austin

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Do I need IT experience to use the kits?
A: No. All materials are designed for non-technical users. If you can onboard a new hire, you can deploy this training.

Q: Is it a subscription?
A: No. All kits are a one-time purchase. No recurring fees ever.

Q: Can I see a sample before buying?
A: Yes. The Free Sample Kit requires no signup — download instantly at https://smbcyberhub.com/free-cyber-security-training/

Q: Will this satisfy my cyber insurer?
A: Yes. The kits include the training records, policies, and checklists that insurers typically require for renewal.

Q: Is the training GDPR compliant?
A: Yes. Materials are aligned with GDPR Article 39.1(b) training requirements.

Q: Can I use the Pro Kit for multiple offices?
A: Yes. The Pro Kit includes an unlimited internal use license.

Q: How does this compare to free templates online?
A: Most free templates are generic, outdated, or overly technical. SMBCyberHub kits are purpose-built for SMBs, audit-aligned, and include training materials with quizzes — not just policy documents.
